title: 18 Inch Get Well Soon Foil Balloons Set, 4pcs Mylar Round Rainbow Balloon with GET WELL SOON Letter Print Helium Balloons for Kids Adults Hospital Recovery Cheer Up Thinking of You Party Decorations
features: 18 Inch Get Well Soon Balloon: You will receive 4pcs 18 inch get well soon mylar balloons. Ideal for hospital recovery balloons, get well soon party decorations, thinking of you gifts, encouragement gifts, rainbow birthday decorations, classroom decor, or office cheer-up centerpiece. Adds positivity and warmth to any setting.

Versatile for Many Occasions: This round rainbow foil balloon features colorful “GET WELL SOON” lettering with rainbows, stars, and pastel accents. Perfect for get well soon gifts, recovery decorations, and cheer up presents for kids and women.

Quality & Safe: Made from premium quality, non toxic Mylar foil, this get well balloon is durable, safe for children, and long-lasting. Thick seal minimizes leaks and keeps balloons inflated longer, making it perfect for recovery room décor or gift baskets.

Easy Inflation: Compatible with helium or air. Inflate easily with a pump or straw no professional skills required. Self-sealing design makes setup hassle-free. Reusable balloon is great for hospital visits, get well soon decorations, or rainbow party themes.

Customer Service: We value your experience! If you encounter any issues with our rainbow get well soon balloons, please contact us—we will respond within 24 hours to ensure your complete satisfaction.
description: Product Size & Specifications 🎀 Quantity: 4pcs foil balloons 🎀 Size: 18 Inch 🎀 Material: Durable aluminum foil, non-toxic, reusable 🎀 Color: Rainbow with colorful “GET WELL SOON” lettering, stars & pastel accents 🎀 Features: Leak-resistant, self-sealing, inflated with air or helium Perfect for Multiple Themes & Occasions ✨ Get Well Soon & Recovery Gifts: These rainbow get well soon balloons are designed to bring positivity and warmth to hospital rooms, recovery spaces, or home care. A cheerful addition to gift baskets or bedside decorations, they uplift spirits instantly. ✨ Encouragement & Thinking of You: Perfect for cheering up a loved one, friend, coworker, or student. Use these balloons as part of encouragement gifts, office cheer-up décor, or classroom inspiration setups to spread kindness and support. ✨ Hospital Visits & Home Display: Ideal for decorating a patient’s room, these balloons stay inflated longer to brighten up recovery days. They are also a thoughtful decoration for home settings, creating a hopeful and uplifting atmosphere. Instructions and Important Tips ❗ Do not over-inflate to avoid damage. 💨 Fill with helium for floating balloons or with air for wall/backdrop setups. Inflate using a hand pump or straw for convenience. 🔒 Self-sealing design requires no tying, making setup quick and stress-free. 🔥 Store in a cool, dry place. Keep away from flames, sharp objects, and direct sunlight. 🌞 Due to lighting and screen settings, colors may appear slightly different from images.
